---
title: "Bayesian Model Averaging with the BIC Approximation"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Bayesian Model Averaging with the BIC Approximation}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(BayesianId)
```

```{r load_data}
data("penguins")
head(penguins)
```

```{r full_model}
mass_lm_full = lm(body_mass ~ flipper_len*bill_len*island,
                  data = na.omit(penguins))
```

```{r check_full_model}
plot(mass_lm_full)
```

```{r create_bma_object}
mass_lm_bma = bma(mass_lm_full)
```

```{r print}
print(mass_lm_bma)
```

```{r terms}
summary(mass_lm_bma, type = "terms")
```

```{r models}
summary(mass_lm_bma, type = "models")
```

```{r est}
summary(mass_lm_bma, type = "est")
```
